comments.body:
## Code Review

This pull request refactors the Proposals page to implement custom cursor-based pagination, filtering by status and repository, and URL state synchronization. The changes replace the previous DataTable with a more flexible dual-layout (table and cards) and update the data schemas. Review feedback identifies issues with the 'All States' filter persistence, the lack of pagination state in the URL which causes UI resets on refresh, and the need for debouncing the repository search input to prevent excessive API calls.

![medium](https://www.gstatic.com/codereviewagent/medium-priority.svg)

In conjunction with the status initialization fix, the URL synchronization should explicitly set the status parameter even if it is an empty string (representing 'All States'), to ensure it overrides the backend's default 'open' filter upon refresh.

```suggestion
    if (status !== 'open') params.set('status', status);
```

![medium](https://www.gstatic.com/codereviewagent/medium-priority.svg)

The pagination labels ('Page X', 'Items Y-Z') rely on `cursorStack`, which is not persisted in the URL. Consequently, if a user refreshes the page or shares a link to a specific cursor, the UI will incorrectly display 'Page 1' and '1-50' regardless of the actual position in the result set. Consider persisting the page index in the URL or adjusting the labels to be relative when the stack is empty but a cursor is present.

![medium](https://www.gstatic.com/codereviewagent/medium-priority.svg)

The repository filter triggers a network request on every keystroke, which can lead to excessive API load and potential race conditions. It is recommended to debounce this input so that the query only triggers after the user has stopped typing for a short duration (e.g., 300ms).

TaskPreviewSchema requires `repository`, but the UI never reads `taskPreview.repository` (it uses `row.repository`). If the API omits `repository` inside `taskPreview` (common for 'preview' payloads), Zod parsing will fail and the page will show an error. Make `taskPreview.repository` optional/nullable or remove it from the schema unless it is guaranteed by the API.

The `status` state is not validated against the allowed values and defaults via `|| 'open'`, which makes it impossible to reflect a URL like `?status=` (intended to mean 'All States'). Also, if `?status=<unknown>` is present, the `<select value={status}>` won’t match any option, creating an inconsistent UI state and potentially filtering to zero results. Parse/validate the initial status (e.g., allow '' or one of `PROPOSAL_STATUSES`, otherwise default), and avoid relying on `toLowerCase()` as the validator.

The `status` state is not validated against the allowed values and defaults via `|| 'open'`, which makes it impossible to reflect a URL like `?status=` (intended to mean 'All States'). Also, if `?status=<unknown>` is present, the `<select value={status}>` won’t match any option, creating an inconsistent UI state and potentially filtering to zero results. Parse/validate the initial status (e.g., allow '' or one of `PROPOSAL_STATUSES`, otherwise default), and avoid relying on `toLowerCase()` as the validator.
This `useMemo` doesn’t transform or sort—it's effectively `data?.items ?? []`. Removing it (or actually sorting here) would reduce indirection and keep the 'sortedItems' naming aligned with behavior.

## Pull request overview Refactors the Proposals page UI and data fetching to align with the unified Tasks List styling, filter/query parameter behavior, and cursor-based pagination—aiming to reduce “looks strange” layout issues and avoid empty/unstable results. **Changes:** - Rebuilt `ProposalsPage` with unified “queue” layout, filters, cursor pagination, and status pill styling. - Expanded Zod schemas to match the newer proposals API shape (fields + pagination cursor). - Updated Vite-built dashboard assets and manifest wiring to point at new hashed bundles/chunks. ### Reviewed changes Copilot reviewed 1 out of 13 changed files in this pull request and generated 5 comments.
Show a summary per file | File | Description | | ---- | ----------- | | frontend/src/entrypoints/proposals.tsx | Main refactor: unified layout, filters, cursor pagination, Zod schema updates | | api_service/static/task_dashboard/dist/assets/tasks-list-D1L41vIK.js | Removed old built Tasks List bundle | | api_service/static/task_dashboard/dist/assets/tasks-list-CiovgtgE.js | Added new built Tasks List bundle referencing updated shared chunks | | api_service/static/task_dashboard/dist/assets/task-detail-BT1AVjjV.js | Removed old built Task Detail bundle | | api_service/static/task_dashboard/dist/assets/task-detail-DihIh7MR.js | Added new built Task Detail bundle referencing updated shared chunks | | api_service/static/task_dashboard/dist/assets/schedules-BP1w2Aht.js | Built bundle updated to reference new DataTable chunk hash | | api_service/static/task_dashboard/dist/assets/proposals-KvXTnnK3.js | Removed old built Proposals bundle | | api_service/static/task_dashboard/dist/assets/proposals-BO1RIbGB.js | Added new built Proposals bundle with unified layout/pagination | | api_service/static/task_dashboard/dist/assets/manifests-Us9h3UDY.js | Built bundle updated to reference new DataTable chunk hash | | api_service/static/task_dashboard/dist/assets/executionStatusPillClasses-CxjYAfBR.js | Removed old built status-pill chunk | | api_service/static/task_dashboard/dist/assets/executionStatusPillClasses-BGDpw-qN.js | Added new built status-pill chunk (now imports mountPage chunk) | | api_service/static/task_dashboard/dist/.vite/manifest.json | Updated manifest entries to new hashed bundle/chunk filenames |
